test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: StrategicGuiLiveTest combines live dialog behavior checks with source-inspection assertions for all seven scoped SSW dialogs, including the corrected BattleResultsGUI edit-stats controls, and GuiTests passed 25/25 on verifier rerun.
